value_chain_position: Developer workflow and collaboration platform layer — sells the OS for software development teams (Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Rovo AI) used as the system of record for engineering work across virtually every cloud-native organization.
relative_comps: Atlassian is deeply embedded in developer workflows with 25% YoY growth and 19% FCF margin; it competes most directly with Microsoft/GitHub in DevOps and Notion/Linear in the next-gen collaboration market. The Rovo AI agent layer (launched 2025) is the critical bet on becoming the AI-orchestration layer for enterprise dev teams, warranting the ai_infrastructure theme. Net cash position provides M&A flexibility; the $25B cap is compressed relative to growth vs. ServiceNow at a much larger scale.
